name_en: 💖【Complete Original Packaging】💖【New Arrival】Miu Women's Nappa Suede Leather Handbag, inspired by a classic design, restructured for a lighter feel and a fresh personality, creating a classic piece with eternal charm. Embossed letter logo, adding a signature element 👝. Features a handle, suitable as a handbag or shoulder bag! Removable charm, vintage gold hardware, front embossed letter logo, lined with a zip pocket and slip pocket!
